title: debrief evidence sidecar
description: The bulky evidence sidecar (corpus.evidence.json) holding raw transcript snippets keyed by id. Stays LOCAL; it is NOT part of the portable/standard hot file and is never shared. Loaded only when a question is live (get_evidence).

items.description: Snippets keyed by EvidenceItem.id (the same id stored in Cluster.evidenceIds).

sessionId.description: The session this snippet came from.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the underlying turn, if known.

turnRange.description: Session-local turn indices [start, end] the snippet spans, if known.

cwd.description: The turn's working directory (Claude Code cwd), if known. PRIVACY-SENSITIVE (absolute path) — lives ONLY in this sidecar, NEVER the hot file. Used to compute the hot file's RelationalFacts.distinctRepos COUNT.

gitBranch.description: The turn's git branch (Claude Code gitBranch), if known. PRIVACY-SENSITIVE / sidecar-only; the hot file carries only the distinctBranches COUNT derived from it.

snippet.description: The raw snippet text (bulky; never enters the hot file).
